case_title: FAHIMEH MCENTIRE VS. TWIN CAPITAL MORTGAGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCENTIRE, FAHIMEH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TWIN CAPITAL MORTGAGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $2,615.45 PRINCIPAL, $4.43 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,799.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCENTIRE, FAHIMEH AS TO DEFENDANT TWIN CAPITAL MORTGAGE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
